message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
package "OpenAI-Baseline" {
    class RLImplementation
}

package "OpenAI-Gym" {
    note as gym_note: Generic interface between RL algorithms and simulation environments
    class Env
}

package "atc-reinforcement-learning" {
    class AtcGym
    class Airspace
    class Runway
    class Corridor
    class Airplane
    class SimParameters
    class MinimumVectoringAltitude
}

RLImplementation --> Env
AtcGym --|> Env
AtcGym *-- Airspace
AtcGym *-- Runway
AtcGym *-- Airplane
AtcGym *-- SimParameters
Airspace *-- "many" MinimumVectoringAltitude : 1
Runway *-- Corridor
Airplane --> SimParameters

note right of gym_note : .
gym_note ..> Env

@enduml
```
